languages.text: "Жаль, что деяния Теодоры стоили жизни и страданий миллионам людям".

traits.locale_text: "Жаль, что деяния Теодоры стоили жизни и страданий миллионам людям".

languages.text: "It is a shame Theodora's deeds cost millions of people their lives and caused tremendous suffering."
languages.original_text: "Жаль, что деяния Теодоры стоили жизни и страданий миллионам людям".

languages.text: "Es ist eine Schande, dass Theodoras Taten Millionen von Menschen das Leben gekostet und unermessliches Leid verursacht haben."
languages.original_text: "It is a shame Theodora's deeds cost millions of people their lives and caused tremendous suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist eine Schande, dass Theodoras Taten Millionen von Menschen das Leben gekostet und unermessliches Leid verursacht haben."

languages.text: "Il est regrettable que les actes de Théodora aient coûté la vie à des millions de personnes et causé d'immenses souffrances.
languages.original_text: "It is a shame Theodora's deeds cost millions of people their lives and caused tremendous suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Il est regrettable que les actes de Théodora aient coûté la vie à des millions de personnes et causé d'immenses souffrances.

languages.text: "Es una pena que los actos de Teodora costaran la vida a millones de personas y causaran un sufrimiento tremendo".
languages.original_text: "It is a shame Theodora's deeds cost millions of people their lives and caused tremendous suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Es una pena que los actos de Teodora costaran la vida a millones de personas y causaran un sufrimiento tremendo".

languages.text: "Theodora'nın yaptıklarının milyonlarca insanın hayatına mal olması ve muazzam acılara yol açması utanç vericidir."
languages.original_text: "It is a shame Theodora's deeds cost millions of people their lives and caused tremendous suffering."

traits.locale_text: "Theodora'nın yaptıklarının milyonlarca insanın hayatına mal olması ve muazzam acılara yol açması utanç vericidir."
